title: ipomoea aspera
intro: Ipomoea aspera, also known as Rough-leaved Morning Glory, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, characterized by its coarse, hairy leaves and trumpet-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea aspera include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
